calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Rauch, via ZOOM, for James Burns, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that there is an issue with petitioner's request of a minimum bond as the petitioner resides in Arizona and the existing liabilities of liens against the real property and two civil actions for collection of credit card debt. Counsel provides oral advocacy for his request of a minimum bond and believes that a bond in the amount of $100,000 might be reasonable. The court suggests a continuance for counsel to submit evidence to support his request. After additional conversation, counsel requests that the court grant the petition with a $700,000 bond. The court advises counsel that it will consider his arguments regarding bond and the amount of bond shall be determined based on the representations he has provided to the court.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
